code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if string.len(token) > 0
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            sum = sum + v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if string.len(token) > 0
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      sum = sum + v
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
println("sum_even=#{sum}")
